title: COPY INTO fails on perfectly clean CSV file
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Batting (playerID VARCHAR NOT NULL, yearID INTEGER CHECK (yearID > 1900), stint INTEGER DEFAULT 1, teamID VARCHAR, lgID VARCHAR, G INTEGER DEFAULT 0, AB INTEGER DEFAULT 0, R INTEGER DEFAULT 0, H INTEGER DEFAULT 0, X2B INTEGER DEFAULT 0, X3B INTEGER DEFAULT 0, HR INTEGER DEFAULT 0, RBI INTEGER DEFAULT 0, SB INTEGER DEFAULT 0, CS INTEGER DEFAULT 0, BB INTEGER DEFAULT 0, SO INTEGER DEFAULT 0, IBB INTEGER DEFAULT 0, HBP INTEGER DEFAULT 0, SH INTEGER DEFAULT 0, SF INTEGER DEFAULT 0, GIDP INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
LOAD DATA LOCAL INFILE '/path/to/clean.csv' INTO TABLE Batting FIELDS TERMINATED BY ',';
SELECT playerID, yearID, teamID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = (SELECT MAX(yearID) FROM Batting);
INSERT INTO Batting (playerID, yearID, teamID) VALUES ('player1', 2023, 'teamA');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Batting WHERE G IS NULL OR AB IS NULL;
key_bug_features: COPY INTO fails on clean CSV file
